name: Syndigo Content Experience Hub API
what_it_does: Syndigo Content Experience Hub (CXH) REST API for manufacturers and brands to syndicate product content to retailers, distributors, and digital channels through the world's largest retailer-connected content network. Enables AI agents to manage product content submission and validation for retailer content onboarding automation, handle GDSN (Global Data Synchronization Network) product data publication for global retail supply chain automation, access retailer-specific content requirement validation for channel compliance automation, retrieve content acceptance status and retailer feedback for product content quality automation, manage digital assets and rich content (images, videos, 360° views) syndication for retailer enhanced content automation, handle multi-retailer content distribution from single source for omnichannel syndication automation, access retailer content grade and digital shelf performance analytics for product content optimization automation, retrieve category-specific content validation rules for retailer compliance automation, manage content template and retailer requirement mapping for content governance automation, and integrate Syndigo with ERP, PIM, DAM, and retailer merchandising systems for end-to-end product content syndication.
use_cases: Syndicating product content from brand management automation agents
Validating retailer requirements from content compliance agents
Publishing GDSN data from supply chain synchronization agents
Optimizing digital shelf from product content analytics agents
not_for: Internal product information management (use inRiver or Akeneo for PIM)
Consumer product review management (use Bazaarvoice or PowerReviews)
Real-time inventory and pricing (use ERP or retail POS APIs)
best_when: A manufacturer or brand wanting AI agents to automate product content syndication to Walmart, Kroger, Target, and 1,750+ other retailers in Syndigo's network, with retailer-specific validation, GDSN data publication, and digital shelf performance analytics.
avoid_when: GDSN DATA ACCURACY FOR REGULATORY PRODUCT ATTRIBUTES: GDSN product data publication via Syndigo for food, beverage, and health products must include accurate regulatory attributes (nutrition facts, allergens, country of origin); automated GDSN publication with incorrect regulatory attributes creates product recall risk and FDA product labeling violation. FDA NUTRITION LABELING AUTOMATED CONTENT GENERATION: Automated product content generation for food products distributed via Syndigo must comply with FDA Nutrition Labeling and Education Act; automated content that modifies or approximates nutrition information without nutritional analysis creates FDA nutrition labeling violation. RETAILER CONTENT AGREEMENT COMPLIANCE: Syndigo retailer content submissions must comply with each retailer's content agreement requirements; automated content submission that doesn't meet retailer-specific image dimension, format, or prohibited content requirements creates retailer content rejection and product listing removal.

auth.notes: Syndigo uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Formed in 2019 from merger of Webcollage and Kwikee. Acquired 1WorldSync in 2022. Private (Symphony Technology Group). World's largest retailer-connected content network: 1,750+ retailers and 11,000+ brands. GDSN provider. Digital shelf analytics. Rich content and enhanced content syndication. Competes with Salsify and inRiver for brand product content syndication.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription for manufacturers and brands
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription based on retailer count, product volume, and content modules; GDSN data pool access included in subscription; enhanced content modules separately priced
pricing.notes: Chicago IL. Symphony Technology Group. Annual subscription. Retailer count and volume-based pricing. GDSN included. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; content and syndication queries throttled; webhooks for content acceptance and retailer feedback events

known_agent_gotchas: RETAILER-SPECIFIC CONTENT REQUIREMENT RULES CHANGE FREQUENTLY: Syndigo retailer content requirements (image dimensions, required attributes, prohibited content) are updated by retailers; automated content submission without requirement freshness check creates submission failure due to changed retailer standards; implement retailer requirement validation refresh in automated content pipeline before submission

GDSN PUBLICATION TO MULTIPLE DATA POOLS: GDSN data synchronization may require publication to multiple data pools for different retailer ecosystems; automated GDSN product data submission must identify correct data pool for each retailer; GDSN publication to wrong data pool creates product data that is not visible to target retailer's buying system

1WORLDSYNC ACQUISITION PLATFORM MIGRATION: Syndigo acquired 1WorldSync in 2022; customers from both platforms may be on separate API systems during platform consolidation; verify which API platform your Syndigo account is on (Syndigo CXH or 1WorldSync) before automated integration development to avoid building on the wrong API surface

ENHANCED CONTENT ACCEPTANCE QUEUE LAG: Retailer enhanced content (A+ content, below-the-fold) acceptance by retailers has manual review queue lag (1-7 business days for some retailers); automated enhanced content deployment timelines must account for retailer review queue; automated product launch planning that assumes immediate enhanced content live-date creates timing misalignment with retailer content activation

DIGITAL ASSET FILE SIZE AND FORMAT RETAILER VARIANCE: Retailer digital asset requirements vary significantly (Walmart: 2000x2000 JPEG, Target: 2400x2400, Amazon: 1000x1000 minimum); automated image submission must apply retailer-specific transformation and format conversion; automated submission of uniform image spec to all retailers creates rejection for retailers with stricter format requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product content syndication. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product content, GDSN data, and retailer syndication data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Content syndication. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product content and retailer syndication data.
